debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
⊢ deriv (GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f) = GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f

funext t
  rw [interpolated, Function.comp]
  simp only [interpolator, Pi.smul_apply, Pi.add_apply, Pi.sub_apply, one_smul, sub_eq_add_neg,
    add_comm, add_left_neg, add_zero]
  have : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun z ↦ f z) ((1 - t) • x + t • y) := by
    apply ContDiff.differentiableAt
    apply contDiff_of_contDiff2
    exact inferInstance
  simpa using this.fderiv_comp_of_fderiv (by continuity)
